features.name: Micro Patch route
features.summary: Simple local style/copy changes skip heavy workflows.
features.user_value: Small edits stay fast.

features.name: Route Guard
features.summary: Verifies actual diff still fits selected route.
features.user_value: Fast routes cannot silently expand into risky changes.

features.name: Explicit Subagent Activation
features.summary: Adds project-scoped agents and automatic subagent selection.
features.user_value: Users do not need to memorize subagent prompts.

features.name: Model Routing Strategy
features.summary: Uses fast mini models for read-only scouts and stronger models for risky implementation/review.
features.user_value: Balances speed and quality automatically.

features.name: Feature Matrix
features.summary: Machine-readable feature discovery for releases.
features.user_value: Users can see what is new without reading diffs.

features.name: Safe Migration Plan
features.summary: Plans governance-file migrations without overwriting local changes.
features.user_value: Upgrades preserve team customizations.

features.name: Install Manifest Ledger
features.summary: Tracks generated files, hashes, and upgrade policies.
features.user_value: Upgrade tools can distinguish unchanged, modified, missing, and custom files.

features.name: Clean Init Profile
features.summary: Initializes target projects with project-owned governance files only; plugin-global .codex agents/prompts/config stay in the plugin unless explicitly requested.
features.user_value: Projects stay clean and plugin upgrades are less noisy.

features.name: Project Hygiene Doctor
features.summary: Detects plugin-global assets that were copied into target projects and quarantines safe generated files without deleting custom project overrides.
features.user_value: Users can repair initialized projects and reduce upgrade conflicts.

features.name: Plugin Repository Self-Inspection
features.summary: Treats the Project Governor plugin repository itself as clean when --project matches --plugin-root, including its own .codex agents, prompts, and config.
features.user_value: Plugin maintainers can run the hygiene doctor in this source repository without false target-project cleanup warnings.

features.name: Copied Plugin Source Detection
features.summary: Keeps flagging copied plugin metadata and skills in downstream projects when they are not the configured plugin root.
features.user_value: Target-project cleanup still catches accidental plugin-source leaks while the plugin repository can self-govern.

features.name: Clean Reinstall Manager
features.summary: Adds a skill and deterministic helpers for user-level plugin reinstall, governed-project discovery, and clean project refresh.
features.user_value: Users can reinstall the plugin and refresh initialized projects without copying plugin-global assets or overwriting project customizations.

features.name: Project refresh trash/quarantine
features.summary: Moves plugin-global noise to .project-governor/trash/<timestamp>/ instead of deleting it.
features.user_value: Projects can be cleaned while preserving recoverability.

features.name: DESIGN.md Governor
features.summary: Adds opt-in Google Labs Code DESIGN.md support for design tokens, design rationale, linting, summaries, and diff checks.
features.user_value: UI/style work can use a structured design-system source of truth without copying plugin-global assets into projects.

features.name: Bundled DESIGN.md fallback linter
features.summary: Provides deterministic Python checks for token references, colors, contrast, section order, duplicate sections, typography, and component properties.
features.user_value: Projects can validate DESIGN.md even when the official npm CLI is unavailable.

features.name: GPT-5.5 Auto Orchestrator
features.summary: Automatically chooses Project Governor skills, subagents, models, context budget, and quality gates from the user request.
features.user_value: Users no longer need to manually list Project Governor skills or subagents for common workflows.

features.name: Context Indexer
features.summary: Builds and queries a compact project context index so sessions can avoid reading all initialization docs.
features.user_value: New sessions can retrieve task-specific context faster and with lower token cost.

features.name: Clean reinstall latest runtime mode
features.summary: Allows clean-reinstall-manager to apply GPT-5.5 runtime mode to current or discovered governed projects without copying plugin-global assets.
features.user_value: Existing governed projects can opt into the latest runtime mode through project-owned state.

features.name: Harness v6 runtime contract
features.summary: Makes task-router the single source of truth and lets runtime planning, context retrieval, route guard, quality gate, evidence, and merge readiness share one contract.
features.user_value: Governed projects get a consistent execution path from request classification through final readiness.

features.name: Context Index v2
features.summary: Adds git metadata, language, symbols, imports, headings, sensitivity detection, stale checks, and redaction to project context indexing.
features.user_value: Sessions retrieve task-specific context faster without exposing secret-like content in summaries.

features.name: Session Lifecycle State
features.summary: Adds project-owned session, feature, agent, issue, progress, and quality score state templates.
features.user_value: Long-running work can preserve handoff state and progress inside the governed project.

features.name: Evidence Manifest
features.summary: Adds task evidence manifests for acceptance criteria, test commands, reviews, and docs refresh decisions.
features.user_value: Non-trivial work has auditable completion evidence before merge readiness.

features.name: Harness Doctor
features.summary: Diagnoses Harness v6 install shape, context index, state files, required skills, route guard scripts, and execution readiness.
features.user_value: Users can verify a governed project is ready for Harness v6 execution.

features.name: DESIGN.md Aesthetic Governor
features.summary: Gates UI/frontend work through remote Stitch MCP/Gemini configuration, DESIGN.md read proof, design mode selection, token discipline, and drift verification.
features.user_value: Frontend work can use full-service Stitch/Gemini support or explicit DESIGN_BASIC_MODE while still preserving project-owned design rules.

features.name: Remote Stitch MCP Smoke
features.summary: Configures the hosted Stitch MCP endpoint and adds a real-service smoke script that initializes MCP without a local npm or gcloud dependency.
features.user_value: Users can validate Stitch/Gemini setup from .env-design or shell environment with minimal manual setup and without committing API keys.

features.name: Gemini Protocol Review Script
features.summary: Adds explicit Gemini protocol selection and a full-service review script that records Gemini critique plus Stitch MCP tool availability.
features.user_value: Projects can choose native Gemini generateContent or OpenAI-compatible gateways and keep repeatable UI review evidence.

features.name: Design Basic Mode
features.summary: Allows users to set DESIGN_BASIC_MODE=1 to do frontend work without Gemini/Stitch setup while retaining local DESIGN.md checks.
features.user_value: Projects can continue frontend implementation in constrained environments without silently disabling design governance.

features.name: Governed Memory Search
features.summary: Adds context-indexer memory-search mode for project memory, decisions, task history, releases, upgrade docs, research docs, and project state.
features.user_value: Users can ask why something was decided or what happened before without building shell pipelines or scanning raw chat transcripts.

features.name: Context index history roles
features.summary: Adds task_history and governance_history roles to context-index v2 entries.
features.user_value: Task plans, release notes, upgrade records, and research docs become first-class retrieval targets for future sessions.

features.name: AGENTS.md rule-template drift
features.summary: Surfaces tracked AGENTS.md template hash drift during plugin upgrade planning even when no explicit release migration names AGENTS.md.
features.user_value: Already initialized projects can see new mandatory Project Governor rules without overwriting local AGENTS.md customizations.

features.name: Local marketplace Git update helper
features.summary: Adds a dependency-free helper that installs or updates the user-level Project Governor Git checkout and writes the local marketplace entry.
features.user_value: Users with source: local marketplace installs can update the plugin checkout with one command instead of manually editing marketplace files or recloning.

features.name: Session learning ledgers
features.summary: Adds command-learning and memory-hygiene state files plus a deterministic recorder for failed commands, repeated mistakes, and stale memory candidates.
features.user_value: New sessions can retrieve prior command failures and memory cleanup notes without the user having to ask Codex to remember them.

features.name: Proactive memory-search policy
features.summary: Adds runtime-plan and AGENTS.md rules requiring memory search at non-trivial session startup and learning capture before final response.
features.user_value: Project Governor actively uses governed memory instead of letting repeated mistakes depend on user reminders.

features.name: Generated docs manifest
features.summary: Adds generated DOCS_MANIFEST.json so agents can inspect a compact documentation map before opening large docs.
features.user_value: New sessions spend fewer tokens locating the right governance docs.

features.name: Section-level context retrieval
features.summary: Adds Markdown section indexing, recommended section line ranges, query-aware compression, and stale/superseded doc filtering.
features.user_value: Agents can read the relevant section first instead of loading full documents.

features.name: Route-specific doc packs
features.summary: Adds route doc packs and context budget gates to task-router and GPT runtime planning.
features.user_value: Each workflow gets a bounded read plan matched to its risk and route.

features.name: .env-design basic mode
features.summary: Lets DESIGN.md UI gates and PreToolUse hooks honor DESIGN_BASIC_MODE=1 from project-root .env-design, not only inherited shell environment variables.
features.user_value: Windows and long-lived Codex hook processes can enter basic mode without fragile per-shell environment inheritance.

features.name: Engineering Standards Governor
features.summary: Adds a dependency-free skill and scanner for source size, function complexity, production mock leakage, mock inventory, and test assertion hygiene.
features.user_value: Coding sessions catch maintainability debt and leftover mocks before quality-gate completion.

features.name: Test plan matrix
features.summary: Expands test planning templates to cover normal behavior, boundaries, error paths, regression, integration/contract, frontend interaction, and explicit not-tested rationale.
features.user_value: Agents must plan the cases users expect instead of relying on narrow happy-path tests.

features.name: Mock governance
features.summary: Adds project rules and report templates for detecting production mock imports and documenting the real dependency behind test doubles.
features.user_value: Mocks stay in tests and fixtures instead of leaking into production code as projects grow.

features.name: Claude Code plugin manifest
features.summary: Adds .claude-plugin metadata that exposes Project Governor as a Claude Code plugin alongside the existing Codex manifest.
features.user_value: Claude Code users can install and validate Project Governor through Claude Code's plugin system.

features.name: Claude Code commands, agents, and hooks
features.summary: Adds pg-* slash commands, Claude subagents, and plugin hooks that wrap existing Project Governor workflows and deterministic scripts.
features.user_value: Claude Code sessions get the same governance entry points, context discipline, and UI preflight reminders without manual prompt copying.

features.name: CLAUDE.md template
features.summary: Adds a target-project CLAUDE.md template that imports AGENTS.md so Claude Code reads the same project rules.
features.user_value: Initialized projects can share one governance rule source across Codex and Claude Code.
